action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of raw-noise (72.67%) and cleaned-label (69.19%) ConvNeXt Tiny models with simple horizontal-flip TTA achieved 74.01% accuracy (new best). We have ~87 minutes and 23 iterations remaining—enough for one more training run but not many. Analysis: Before committing to a lengthy training run, we can squeeze free gains from stronger test-time augmentation. Replacing single-flip TTA with 10-crop TTA (FiveCrop + horizontal flips) should improve robustness on the 224×224 inputs without any training cost. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to use TenCrop TTA, run a quick local sanity check, and immediately submit evaluation.
